header.heroSubtitle: Shakisha abaganga wizeye kandi ufate gahunda byoroshye

footer.newsletterSubtitle: Iyandikishe ubone amakuru y'ubuvuzi, ivugurura rya sisitemu n'inama zo kwirinda bivuye kuri e-Ivuze.
footer.companyDescription: e-Ivuze ni urubuga rw'ubuvuzi rukomeye mu Rwanda, ruhuza abarwayi n'abaganga bizewe, ibitaro na farumasi hirya no hino mu gihugu.

latestPost1.title: Kwemera ubuvuzi bwa interineti mu Rwanda

about.keywords: ubuvuzi, ubuvuzi kuri murandasi, abaganga, ibitaro, farumasi, Rwanda
about.title: Ibyerekeye e-Ivuze
about.paragraph1: e-Ivuze ni urubuga rwa mbere mu Rwanda mu gutanga serivisi z'ubuvuzi hakoreshejwe ikoranabuhanga, rufasha abarwayi kugera ku baganga, ibitaro n'ama farumasi mu buryo bworoshye kandi bwizewe.
about.visionHeading: Gutanga serivisi zâ€™ubuvuzi zinoze, zizewe kandi zorohereza buri wese
about.paragraph2: Twemera ko ntamuntu ukwiye kuzenguruka imijyi cyangwa gutonda imirongo miremire kugira ngo abone umuvuzi cyangwa abaze ikibazo cyâ€™ubuvuzi. Ni yo mpamvu dushyira gahunda, dosiye zâ€™ubuvuzi, kwishyura na serivisi zo gukurikirana umurwayi byose mu buryo bumwe kuri murandasi.
about.visionText: Dukorana nâ€™ibitaro, amavuriro, laboratwari na farumasi zitandukanye mu gihugu hose kugira ngo twubake sisitemu yâ€™ubuvuzi ihuza impande zose, ikorohereza imiryango kubona serivisi zinoze kandi ifasha abatanga serivisi kwita ku murwayi kurusha ikindi kintu cyose.

feature1.title: Urubuga rumwe rw'ibyo ukeneye byose
feature1.desc: Ushobora gufata gahunda, gukurikirana ingendo zawe kwa muganga, kubona ibyanditswe n'imiti, ndetse ukavugana n'abaganga ukoresheje telefone cyangwa mudasobwa.

feature2.title: Abaganga nâ€™ibitaro byizewe
feature2.desc: Dukorana nâ€™abaganga bafite ibyemezo byemewe nâ€™ibitaro byanditswe, kugira ngo serivisi uhabwa zibe nziza kandi zizewe.

feature3.title: Iteganyirizwa umuryango nyarwanda
feature3.desc: Twibanda ku bantu baba mu mujyi nâ€™aho mu cyaro, dushyigikira ibigo byâ€™ubuvuzi bitandukanye dukoresheje imikorere ikwiye u Rwanda nâ€™imico yaho.

about.paragraph3: Twiyemeje kurinda ubuzima bwâ€™amakuru yâ€™umurwayi, kumwubaha no kumusobanurira buri kimwe. Dukorana bya hafi nâ€™abaganga nâ€™inzego zâ€™ubuzima kugira ngo ikoranabuhanga rifashe kunoza serivisi aho kuyisimbura.

doctors.heroDescriptionSpeciality: Shakisha abaganga bizewe mu {{speciality}} muri Rwanda. Fata gahunda n'abaganga bizewe, soma ibitekerezo by'abarwayi, kandi ubone ubuvuzi igihe ubukeneye.
doctors.heroDescriptionAll: Hura n'abaganga bizewe bo muri Rwanda. Shakisha abaganga bizewe mu buryo bwose bw'ubuvuzi, kuva ku baganga rusange kugeza ku baganga bizewe.

login.globalSignupDescription: Hanga konti y'umurwayi cyangwa umuganga kugirango utangire gushaka gahunda no kuyobora ubuvuzi.
login.doctorDetailsDescription: Kurangiza umwirondoro wawe w'ubuganga kugirango utangire kwakira gahunda.
login.aboutPlaceholder: Bwire abarwayi ibyerekeye ibyo wize, ubunararibonye, n'uko uvura...
login.selectRoleDescription: Hitamo inshingano yawe kugirango ukomeze iyandikishe
login.globalLoginDescription: Koresha iyinjira rimwe kugirango ujye ahantu hose kuri e-Ivuze.
login.heroDescription: Jya kuri dashboard yawe y'ubuvuzi, uyobore gahunda, kandi uhure n'abaganga bizewe hirya no hino mu Rwanda.
login.featurePatientsBody: Fata gahunda n'abaganga bizewe, jya kuri dosiye zawe z'ubuvuzi, kandi uyobore urugendo rwawe rw'ubuvuzi.
login.featureDoctorsBody: Yobora ibikorwa byawe, vugana n'abarwayi, kandi itangire imirimo yawe y'ubuganga hamwe n'ibikoresho byacu by'ikoranabuhanga.
login.featureHospitalsBody: Huzahurana n'ubuvuzi bw'abarwayi, uyobora abakozi, kandi urangize imirimo y'ibitaro hamwe n'ibikorwa bihurira.
login.loginHeadline: Jya kuri konti yawe ya e-Ivuze
login.name: Izina

form.title: TUVUGISHE
form.helper: Itsinda ryacu ry'abakozi risubiza mu munsi umwe w'akazi
form.name: Izina Rizima
form.subject: Insanganyamatsiko

contact.title: TWANDIKIRE
contact.subtitle: Sura ibiro byacu i Kigali, fata gahunda kuri murandasi cyangwa utwandikire email n'ubufasha kuri telefoni 24/7.
contact.keywords: twandikire e-Ivuze, ubufasha bw'ubuvuzi, Kigali Rwanda, ubujyanama bw'ubuvuzi kuri murandasi
contact.hero: Turi hano kugufasha ku rugendo rw'ubuzima bwawe
contact.careersText: Turi guhora tushaka abakozi b'ubuvuzi bafite umuhate wo kutugezaho ubuzima bwiza mu Rwanda.

cards.title: Urubuga Rumwe, Ubuvuzi Bwuzuye
cards.description: Fata gahunda, jya kuri dosiye zawe z'ubuvuzi, uyobore imiti, kandi vugana n'itsinda ryawe ry'ubuvuzi - byose kuva ku rubuga rumwe rutekanye.

cards.title: Urumuri Rw'igihugu Cyose
cards.description: Hura n'abatanga ubuvuzi hirya no hino mu Rwanda, kuva ku bitaro bikomeye bya Kigali kugeza ku bigo by'ubuvuzi byo mu cyaro bikorerera abaturage b'icyaro.

cards.title: Ishyirwa Ahangaha Ry'Umurwayi
cards.description: Byubatswe n'abaganga ku baturage nyabo. Byoroshye, bitekanye, kandi byashyizwe ahangaha urugendo rwawe rw'ubuzima.

cards.title: Ubuziranenge Bushobora Kwizera
cards.description: Buri mutanga ubuvuzi yemewe, buri dosiye irinzwe, kandi buri kuvugana bugendeshwa n'impuzandengo z'ubuvuzi bwa Rwanda.

bullets: Gufata gahunda ako kanya hamwe n'ubushobozi bwemewe
Kujya ku mateka yawe y'ubuvuzi yuzuye mu buryo bwerinde
Amakuru yo guhamagarira mu gihe cy'ihutirwa ahari buri gihe
Inkunga y'indi zindi mu Cyongereza no mu Kinyarwanda
features.title: IBIKORWA BY'URUBUGA
features.heading: Ubuvuzi Bworoshye ku Rwanda
features.intro: e-Ivuze izana ikoranabuhanga ry'ubuvuzi ry'iki gihe ku Rwanda, bikorohera imiryango gushaka ubuvuzi, kuyobora ubuzima, no guhuzwa n'abatanga ubuvuzi bizewe.

bullets: Ibikoresho by'ikirenga byo kuvugana kuri murandasi bihuza ibigo by'ubuvuzi byo mu cyaro n'abaganga b'inzobere bo mu mijyi
Ubufasha bwo kumenya indwara hakoreshejwe ubwenge bw'ikoranabuhanga kugira ngo imiti ihabwe vuba kandi neza
Amadosiye yuzuye y'abarwayi ahurirwa n'abatanga ubuvuzi bose
Guhuza ibikorwa by'ihutirwa hagati y'ibitaro n'amatambuka yihutirwa ku masaha 24/7
Ibikoresho by'ubuzima bigendera ku byuma bikorerera abaturage b'icyaro mu Rwanda hose
Kureba ubuzima mu gihe nyacyo no kwita ku barwayi b'indwara z'igihe kirekire
Inkunga y'indimi nyinshi kugira ngo abantu bose bafashwe neza
Sisitemu zo kugenzura ubuziranenge kugira ngo ubuzima buhabwe ku rwego rwo hejuru
gallery.title: Guhindura Ubuvuzi Mu Rwanda Hose
gallery.description: Kuva ku bujyanama bw'ubuzima kuri murandasi kugeza ku guhuza ibikorwa by'ihutirwa, reba uko e-Ivuze ihindura ubuvuzi mu Rwanda hose mu bice bitandukanye n'imiryango.

testimonials.title: IBITEKEREZO BYâ€™ABAKIRIYA
testimonials.heading: Abakoresha bavuga iki?
testimonials.subheading: Dore uko e-Ivuze ifasha imiryango kubona ubuvuzi bwizewe, bwihuse kandi bworoshye.

items.quote: Nabonye umuganga byihuse kandi byoroshye. Uko bampaye ubufasha kuri chat no gufata gahunda byatumye numva ntekanye.
items.name: Mukamana Aline
items.title: Umubyeyi

items.quote: Nari ndi mu kazi ariko mbona inama y'umuganga ntarinze kujya ku bitaro. Serivisi ni nziza kandi ituma utinda gake.
items.name: Niyonzima Eric
items.title: Umukozi

items.quote: Gufata gahunda no kubona ibisubizo by'ibizamini byanjye byabaye ibintu byoroshye. e-Ivuze iroroshya ubuvuzi.
items.name: Uwamahoro Chantal
items.title: Umurwayi

items.quote: Nakunzwe n'uko banyumva, bakansobanurira neza, kandi bakankurikirana nyuma y'ibiganiro. Bampaye icyizere.
items.name: Habimana Jean Claude
items.title: Umurwayi

specialists.description: Ku ndwara zisanzwe cyangwa izikeneye kwitabwaho byihariye, tuguhuza nâ€™abaganga nâ€™abaforomo bafite ubumenyi nâ€™uburambe.
